name: io.github.arun250492/personal-mcp
description: Your AI-powered personal desktop assistant. 30+ tools for Gmail, Google Calendar, file management, clipboard, screenshots, browser, app launcher, desktop notifications, social media posting, system info, and more.

environment_variables.name: GMAIL_CREDENTIALS_PATH
environment_variables.description: Path to Gmail OAuth credentials JSON (optional, defaults to ~/.personal-mcp/gmail_credentials.json)

environment_variables.name: TWITTER_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Twitter/X API key for posting tweets (optional)
